key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: Two-year average operating income proxy $144.745M ÷ 179.551M shares; FY2025 OCF $319.306M per ALAB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001736297_26_000010.htm
AI connectivity share gains; normalized owner cash; exit 10× owner cash

open_questions: Review Amazon warrant economics and Customer A concentration for management alignment gate.
Confirm design-win milestone band (**$0 to $35/sh**) versus revenue already in normalized owner cash.
thesis: Astera Labs, Inc. (ALAB) designs fabless semiconductor connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure, including PCIe, CXL, and Ethernet retimers, smart DSPs, and switches. **[Fact]** Shares trade on Nasdaq (ALAB). **[Fact]** FY2025 consolidated revenue was **$852.5 million** (+115% year over year), operating income **$173.4 million**, and net income **$219.1 million** (diluted earnings **$1.22** per share) per `ALAB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001736297_26_000010.htm`. **[Fact]** FY2025 cash was **$167.6 million** plus **$1,021.2 million** in current available-for-sale debt securities against **$31.0 million** of operating lease liabilities; operating cash flow was **$319.3 million**.
why_market_wrong: The stock may trade as a must-own AI connectivity winner while customer concentration and normalized owner economics tell a more bounded story. **[Inference]** Revenue grew **115%** to **$853 million**, yet Customer A accounted for **37%** of revenue and the top customer represented **73%** of accounts receivable at year-end. **[Inference]** Net income benefited from a valuation-allowance release; two-year average operating income per share is about **$0.81**, far below the headline earnings pace. **[Inference]** Proof-first component math at base case sums to about **$19** per share of filing-locked economic value versus a price near **$309**, suggesting the market prices design-win scale and AI infrastructure adoption far beyond what conservative components capture today.
